---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is Your Feature Related to a Problem?
Describe the problem. Example: "I wish I could..."

## Describe the Solution
What would you like to see added?

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context
- GPU model and VRAM
- Use case (batch transcription, real-time, etc.)
- Performance requirements
- Any reference implementations

## Tested?
- [ ] Tested proposed solution locally (if applicable)
- [ ] Benchmarked performance impact (if applicable)
- [ ] Works on multiple AMD GPU models (if applicable)
